description: Water monitoring stations with their location and type of water body

DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_COLIFORMS CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_COLIFORMS (
	FACT_COLIFORMS_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	STATION_ID BIGINT,
	YEAR INTEGER,
	MIN_FECAL_COLIFORM_MPN_PER_100ML VARCHAR(100),
	MAX_FECAL_COLIFORM_MPN_PER_100ML DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MIN_TOTAL_COLIFORM_MPN_PER_100ML VARCHAR(50),
	MAX_TOTAL_COLIFORM_MPN_PER_100ML DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MIN_FAECAL_COLIFORM_FAECAL_MATTER_MPN_PER_100ML DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MAX_FAECAL_COLIFORM_FAECAL_MATTER_MPN_PER_100ML DOUBLE PRECISION
);

description: Dissolved oxygen and biochemical oxygen demand measurements
Temperature measurements at each station by year
